  1. recoder.kit
  2. Transformation

Uses of Class
recoder.kit.Transformation

Packages that use Transformation
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.removegenerics
 
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.kit.transformation
This package contains transformation command objects and associated problem reports.
recoder.kit.transformation.java5to4
Contains transformations which attempt to make a java5 project compilable with -source 1.4 compiler switch and which can be used by a java 1.4 runtime environment.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.

  • Uses of Transformation in de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

    Subclasses of Transformation in de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ClassInitializeMethodBuilder
    Each class is prepared before it is initialised.
    class 
    ClassPreparationMethodBuilder
    Each class is prepared before it is initialised.
    class 
    ConstantStringExpressionEvaluator
     
    class 
    ConstructorNormalformBuilder
    Transforms the constructors of the given class to their normalform.
    class 
    CreateBuilder
    If an allocation expression new Class(...) occurs, a new object has to be created, in KeY this is quite similar to take it out of a list of objects and setting the implicit flag <created> to true as well as setting all fields of the object to their default values.
    class 
    CreateObjectBuilder
    If an allocation expression new Class(...) occurs, a new object has to be created, in KeY this is quite similar to take it out of a list of objects and setting the implicit flag <created> to true as well as setting all fields of the object to their default values.
    class 
    EnumClassBuilder
    This transformation is made to transform any found EnumDeclaration into a corresponding EnumClassDeclaration.
    class 
    ImplicitFieldAdder
    The Java DL requires some implicit fields and methods, that are available in each Java class.
    class 
    InstanceAllocationMethodBuilder
     
    final class 
    JMLTransformer
    RecodeR transformation that parses JML comments, and attaches code-like specifications (ghost fields, set statements, model methods) directly to the RecodeR AST.
    class 
    LocalClassTransformation
    Local and anonymous classes may access variables from the creating context if they are declared final and initialised.
    class 
    PrepareObjectBuilder
    Creates the preparation method for pre-initilizing the object fields with their default settings.
    class 
    RecoderModelTransformer
    The Java DL requires some implicit fields, that are available in each Java class.

  • Uses of Transformation in de.uka.ilkd.key.util.removegenerics

    Subclasses of Transformation in de.uka.ilkd.key.util.removegenerics
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    GenericResolutionTransformation
    This is the base class to all transformations used in the generics removal process.
    class 
    ResolveGenerics
    A recoder transformation that removes all traces of Java5 generics from a file.
    class 
    ResolveMemberReference
     
    class 
    ResolveTypeReference
    Handle a type reference in the generic deletion process.

  • Uses of Transformation in recoder.kit

    Subclasses of Transformation in recoder.kit
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TwoPassTransformation
    A two-pass transformation is a nice special case of a transformation, where all subtransformations do not conflict, or where conflicts between them can be resolved locally.

  • Uses of Transformation in recoder.kit.transformation

    Subclasses of Transformation in recoder.kit.transformation
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AppendMember
    Deprecated.
    Does not (yet) check ambiguity or conflicts.
    class 
    Modify
    Syntactic transformation that modifies a declaration by adding/removing single modifiers.
    class 
    PrepareStatementList
    Syntactic transformation returning a mutable statement list that contains the given statement, and creating a new StatementBlock if necessary.
    class 
    PrependExpressionWithStatements
    Transformation that prepends a given expression (such as a method or variable reference) with a statement or a list of statements.
    class 
    RemoveRedundantTypeReferences
    Transformation that removes all redundant type references from a compilation unit or a series of units.
    class 
    RemoveUnusedImports
    Transformation that removes all superfluous import statements from a compilation unit.
    class 
    RenameMethod
    Transformation that renames a method and all known references to that method.
    class 
    RenamePackage
    Transformation that renames a package by renaming all known references to that package.
    class 
    RenameType
    Transformation that renames a type declaration and all known references to that type.
    class 
    RenameVariable
    Transformation that renames a variable by renaming all known references to that variable.
    class 
    ShiftPreceedingStatementExpressions
    Transformation that ensures that the given expression is evaluated first during execution of the resulting statement, while preserving the behavior.

  • Uses of Transformation in recoder.kit.transformation.java5to4

    Subclasses of Transformation in recoder.kit.transformation.java5to4
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    EnhancedFor2For
    converts an enhanced for loop to an "old style" for loop.
    class 
    MakeConditionalCompatible
    Deals with uses of the conditional(c-like trinary) operator which create intersection types.
    class 
    RemoveAnnotations
    Deals with annotations.
    class 
    RemoveCoVariantReturnTypes
    This transformation does not work yet!
    class 
    RemoveStaticImports
    Removes static imports from a given Compilation Unit and adds qualfication prefixes to (possible) uses of such imports.
    class 
    ReplaceEnums
    untested for enum declarations nested within enum declarations
    static class 
    ReplaceEnums.ReplaceSingleEnum
     
    class 
    ResolveBoxing
    traverses a (sub)tree and replaces (un-)boxing conversions with explicit conversions.
    class 
    ResolveGenerics
    This transformation does not work yet!
    static class 
    ResolveGenerics.ResolveGenericMethod
     
    static class 
    ResolveGenerics.ResolveMethodReturnType
     
    static class 
    ResolveGenerics.ResolveSingleGenericType
     
    static class 
    ResolveGenerics.ResolveSingleVariableDeclaration
     
    class 
    ResolveVarArgs
    Replaces references to var arg methods and var arg methods itself to make it java 1.4 compliant.

  • Uses of Transformation in recoder.service

    Methods in recoder.service with parameters of type Transformation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ChangeHistory.begin(Transformation transformation)
    Reports the start of a new transformation.
    boolean
    ChangeHistory.isReported(Transformation transformation)
    Checks if the given transformation is reported in this history and can be rolled back.
    void
    ChangeHistory.rollback(Transformation transformation)
    Removes the last transformations and reverts all their changes until the given transformation has been rolled back.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    NoSuchTransformationException(Transformation transformation)
